entry.title: ArtButMakeItSports
entry.quote: I turn Art into Sports (and vice versa)

entry.title: Gen-Z Hates Ai
entry.quote: The mention of 'AI' in a positive light was booed at several commencement speeches, and AI use even led to a major mishap at another graduation ceremony. This while a recent Gallup poll shows Gen-Z feelings towards AI is becoming more negative.

entry.title: Apple cofounder Steve Wozniak got cheers, not boos, after telling students they 'all have AI — actual intelligence'
entry.quote: During his speech, Wozniak offered reassurance to new graduates who are entering the workforce at the height of the AI revolution

entry.title: Sam Altman Won in Court Against Elon Musk. But, Really, We All Lost
entry.quote: The cases of Elizabeth Holmes and Sam Bankman-Fried at least offered a pleasant sense of comeuppance. But in Musk v. Altman, to root against Tweedledum was effectively to root for Tweedledee.

entry.title: The Letter S (Donald Knuth, 1980)
entry.quote: The purpose of this paper is to explain what I now consider to be the 'right' mathematics underlying printed S's, and also to give an example of the METAFONT language I have recently been developing.
